meaning: n.[鍖朷浜屾哀鏉傜幆涔欑兎
examples: 17 out of 28 products tested 61 percent contained both formaldehyde and 1, 4-dioxane.
17 out of 28 products tested - 61 percent - contained both formaldehyde and 1, 4-dioxane.
Formaldehyde and 1, 4-dioxane are known carcinogens; formaldehyde can also trigger skin rashes in some children.
Kai is a member of CARD and so he cares about dioxane in Ann Arbor.
The email goes on and gives an example of a high dioxane reading that was excluded from the reports.
